chunks.title: Absalom's Deception
chunks.reason: Describes Absalom's strategy to win the hearts of Israel by posing as a just judge.

chunks.title: The Conspiracy Begins
chunks.reason: Details Absalom's request to go to Hebron and the gathering of his forces.

chunks.title: David Fleeing Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Records David's reaction to the news and his conversation with Ittai the Gittite.

chunks.title: Departure and the Ark
chunks.reason: Narrates the procession out of the city and David's instruction to Zadok regarding the ark.

chunks.title: The Ascent of Olives
chunks.reason: Describes David's emotional journey up the Mount of Olives and his meeting with Hushai.
